news.title: The outlook for oil and holiday fuel prices
news.description: Market Catalysts host Brooke DiPalma welcomes Tortoise Senior Portfolio Manager and Managing Director Rob Thummel to discuss fuel prices ahead of the Fourth of July holiday weekend and the broader outlook for oil (CL=F, BZ=F).

news.title: Oil Extends Fall After Saudi Exports Surge: Why Are Bitcoin and Gold Rallying?
news.description: Oil price fall deepens as Saudi exports recover, while Bitcoin jumps 5% to $61,400 and gold holds above $4,000.

news.title: San Francisco Fed’s Daly says policy slightly restrictive
news.description: Investing.com -- San Francisco Federal Reserve President Mary Daly said Thursday that U.S. monetary policy is slightly restrictive. She noted that strong investment growth in artificial intelligence technology and a stable labor market make the central bank's next move uncertain.

news.title: Wolfe Research upgrades Chevron to Outperform on strong cash flow outlook
news.description: Investing.com -- Wolfe Research upgraded Chevron to "Outperform" from "Peer Perform," saying a recent pullback in the oil major's shares has created an attractive entry point as improving long-term free cash flow prospects are not fully reflected in the stock price.

news.title: OCBC cuts oil price forecasts as Strait of Hormuz shipments recover (OCBC)
news.description: OCBC Group Research has lowered its quarterly Brent crude price forecasts through the second quarter of 2027, citing improving shipping activity through the Strait of Hormuz and renewed expectations of abundant global oil supplies. news.title: The June jobs report laid an egg: The US only added roughly half of what economists had forecast — what it means for you
news.description: Payrolls badly missed the 115,000 economists expected, and the unemployment rate's dip to 4.2% masked a shrinking labor force. Now it's Fed Chair Kevin Warsh's problem.

news.title: 2 Energy Stocks for Long-Term Investors and 1 We Find Risky
news.description: Whether you see them or not, energy businesses play a crucial part in our daily activities, from powering our homes and businesses to powering our transportation and industries. news.title: Don't Want Exposure to SpaceX? Why Investing in These Types of ETFs May Be the Way to Go
news.description: Many funds will soon include SpaceX, and that can make them riskier and more volatile. But that doesn't include ones that track the S&P 500.

news.title: Dow Opens Higher Despite Soft Jobs Report
news.description: Stocks were up to start Thursday’s session after the unemployment rate fell unexpectedly in June.  The Dow rose 370 points, or 0.7%.  The U.S. economy added fewer jobs than economists expected in June, but unemployment dipped to 4.2%.

news.title: Best Momentum Stocks to Buy for July 2nd
news.description: ROK, AMAT, and BBCP made it to the Zacks Rank #1 (Strong Buy) momentum stocks list on July 2, 2026.
